problems_encountered.description: HTTP 403 error when attempting to list invites for project ad6f44a6-132e-4c2a-9208-895494bfcd75. API returned 'Unexpected response status (expected 200, got: 403)'

tool_response_summary: List operation failed with 403 Forbidden error. The authenticated user may lack permissions to view project invites.
execution_notes: Tool executed in 61ms. Received permission denied error. The user may need admin or owner role for the project to list invites. The tool call worked correctly but the operation was rejected by the API due to insufficient privileges.
